description_long: This is a single-serve cup of Bohunka brand yogurt or dessert, featuring a tapered cylindrical shape with a wider top and a sealed foil lid. The packaging is predominantly white with blue and red accents, and it displays realistic images of strawberries, suggesting a strawberry flavor. The lid is printed with the brand name, product description, and a large, detailed strawberry graphic, while the sides show additional branding, product information, and a barcode. The container appears to be made of plastic, with a glossy, smooth finish, and the lid is likely made of foil. Nutritional and ingredient information is printed on the side in fine text. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A Bohunka branded single-serve yogurt or dessert cup with a foil lid, white plastic body, and vivid strawberry graphics. The packaging is glossy, smooth, and features detailed product and brand information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Bohunka brand name, large strawberry graphic, and most of the foil lid's design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the product's ingredient and nutritional information, with part of the strawberry graphic visible.
description_view_2: Another side view focusing on the text-heavy section with ingredients and product details, less of the strawberry graphic visible.
description_view_3: Rear-side view showing the barcode, part of the brand logo, and a partial strawberry image.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue and white rectangular logo with the text 'BOHUSOVICKA MLEKARNA 1901' is visible on the lid and side of the cup.
attribute_flavor_indication: Large, realistic strawberry graphics and the word 'jahodová' (strawberry) on the label indicate strawberry flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is printed on the side of the cup in small text.
